refnamediv.refpurpose: Returns TRUE if A's bounding box is strictly to the left of B's.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: The << operator returns TRUE if the bounding box of geometry A is strictly to the left of the bounding box of geometry B.

note.para: This operand will make use of any indexes that may be available on the geometries.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.programlisting:
SELECT tbl1.column1, tbl2.column1, tbl1.column2 << tbl2.column2 AS left FROM ( VALUES (1, 'LINESTRING (1 2, 1 5)'::geometry)) AS tbl1, ( VALUES (2, 'LINESTRING (0 0, 4 3)'::geometry), (3, 'LINESTRING (6 0, 6 5)'::geometry), (4, 'LINESTRING (2 2, 5 6)'::geometry)) AS tbl2;
column1 | column1 | left ---------+---------+------ 1 | 2 | f 1 | 3 | t 1 | 4 | t (3 rows)
